text: when a phase is empty and we are stepping into that phase with j or k from aim selection (cross phase aim selection), we get stuck in that phase because we are not focussing any aim. can we solve that elegantly? like adding: when a pase has no aims, and we're in aim mode (i), j and k go to first/last aim of next/previous phase if it exists

status.comment: Updated navigateDown and navigateUp in uiStore.ts to detect empty phases (path.aims.length === 0) and automatically select the adjacent phase, preventing the user from getting stuck.
